tasks.subject: Task 0: Install dependencies and configure Astro for SSR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install all required packages and switch Astro from static to server output with Node adapter; mark the two static pages as prerendered.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`
- Modify: `astro.config.mjs`
- Modify: `src/pages/index.astro` (add prerender export)
- Modify: `src/pages/about.astro` (add prerender export)
- Create: `.env.example`
- Modify: `.gitignore` (add `data/`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `ls dist/server/entry.mjs` → file exists
- [ ] `/` and `/about` are prerendered (in `dist/client/`)
- [ ] All new packages installed

**Verify:** `npm run build && ls dist/server/entry.mjs` → file exists

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","astro.config.mjs","src/pages/index.astro","src/pages/about.astro",".env.example",".gitignore"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && ls dist/server/entry.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["npm run build succeeds","dist/server/entry.mjs exists","index.astro and about.astro have export const prerender = true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Database layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `src/lib/db.ts` with all SQLite operations — schema init, seeding, and typed query functions for posts, tools, passkeys, sessions, challenges, and setup tokens.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/db.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 6 tables created on first run
- [ ] Vigilant tool seeded if tools table is empty
- [ ] All typed query functions exported
- [ ] `npm run build` → no errors

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/db.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["All 6 tables created on first run","Vigilant tool seeded if tools table is empty","All typed query functions exported","npm run build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Auth middleware
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `src/middleware.ts` that guards all `/admin/*` and `/api/*` routes (except `/api/auth/*`) with a session cookie check, and logs the first-time setup token to stdout on the first request if no passkeys are registered.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/middleware.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unauthenticated request to `/admin` redirects to `/admin/login`
- [ ] Unauthenticated request to `/api/posts` returns 401 JSON
- [ ] `/api/auth/*` requests pass through without auth check
- [ ] Setup token logged to stdout on first request when no passkeys exist

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no errors; `npm run dev` → `curl -s http://localhost:4321/admin` returns redirect to `/admin/login`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/middleware.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["Unauthenticated /admin redirects to /admin/login","Unauthenticated /api/posts returns 401","Setup token logged when no passkeys registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: WebAuthn API endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the five `/api/auth/*` endpoints that handle passkey login challenge/verify, registration challenge/verify, and logout.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/api/auth/login-challenge.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/auth/verify-login.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/auth/register-challenge.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/auth/verify-registration.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/auth/logout.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /api/auth/login-challenge` returns `{ challengeToken, options }` JSON
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/verify-login` with valid assertion sets session cookie and returns `{ ok: true }`
- [ ] `GET /api/auth/register-challenge?token=<setupToken>` validates setup token and returns options
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/verify-registration` stores credential and returns `{ ok: true }`
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/logout` clears session cookie
- [ ] `npm run build` → no errors

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/api/auth/login-challenge.ts","src/pages/api/auth/verify-login.ts","src/pages/api/auth/register-challenge.ts","src/pages/api/auth/verify-registration.ts","src/pages/api/auth/logout.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["login-challenge returns challengeToken + options","verify-login sets session cookie","register-challenge validates setup token","verify-registration stores credential","logout clears cookie"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Admin login and setup pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the `AdminBase.astro` layout and the two unauthenticated admin pages: `/admin/login` (passkey sign-in) and `/admin/setup` (first-time passkey registration protected by a one-time token).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/layouts/AdminBase.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/admin/login.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/admin/setup.astro`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Visiting `/admin` redirects to `/admin/login`
- [ ] `/admin/login` renders without JS errors
- [ ] `/admin/setup?token=<valid>` renders registration form
- [ ] `/admin/setup?token=<invalid>` renders 403 error

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → visit `/admin`, confirm redirect to `/admin/login`; page renders without JS errors.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/layouts/AdminBase.astro","src/pages/admin/login.astro","src/pages/admin/setup.astro"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["AdminBase layout renders correctly","login page renders without JS errors","setup page validates token correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Content API endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement REST API routes for creating, updating, and deleting posts, tools, and passkeys. All are protected by the middleware session guard.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/api/posts/index.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/posts/[id].ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/tools/index.ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/tools/[id].ts`
- Create: `src/pages/api/passkeys/[id].ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `POST /api/posts` creates a post and returns `{ id }`
- [ ] `PUT /api/posts/[id]` updates post fields
- [ ] `DELETE /api/posts/[id]` deletes post
- [ ] `POST /api/tools` creates a tool
- [ ] `PUT /api/tools/[id]` updates tool
- [ ] `DELETE /api/tools/[id]` deletes tool
- [ ] `DELETE /api/passkeys/[id]` deletes passkey

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/api/posts/index.ts","src/pages/api/posts/[id].ts","src/pages/api/tools/index.ts","src/pages/api/tools/[id].ts","src/pages/api/passkeys/[id].ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /api/posts creates post","PUT /api/posts/[id] updates post","DELETE /api/posts/[id] deletes post","CRUD for tools works","DELETE /api/passkeys/[id] works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admin dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build `/admin/index.astro` — the main dashboard listing all posts (with draft/published status) and all tools, with edit links and delete buttons.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/admin/index.astro`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dashboard shows all posts with draft/published badge
- [ ] Dashboard shows all tools with display order
- [ ] Edit links navigate to correct routes
- [ ] Delete buttons call correct API endpoints via fetch
- [ ] "New Post" and "Add Tool" buttons visible

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → after auth, dashboard shows seeded Vigilant tool; create a test post via API and confirm it appears.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/admin/index.astro"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Posts listed with draft/published badge","Tools listed with edit links","Delete buttons work","New Post and Add Tool buttons present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Post editor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the TipTap-powered post editor for creating and editing blog posts at `/admin/posts/new` and `/admin/posts/[id]`.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/admin/posts/new.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/admin/posts/[id].astro`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TipTap editor renders with toolbar (Bold, Italic, H2, H3, Code, Code Block, Link, Bullet List, Ordered List)
- [ ] Title auto-generates slug on change
- [ ] Save submits via fetch PUT (edit) or fetch POST (new) and redirects to `/admin`
- [ ] Edit page pre-fills all fields from existing post (initial content via JSON data tag, not define:vars)
- [ ] Published toggle works

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → create a post, confirm it appears on dashboard; visit `/blog/<slug>` confirms it's live.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/admin/posts/new.astro","src/pages/admin/posts/[id].astro"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["TipTap editor renders with toolbar","Title auto-generates slug","Save via fetch redirects to /admin","Edit page pre-fills from JSON data tag","Published toggle works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Tools and passkeys admin pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build `/admin/tools.astro` (tool CRUD with edit forms inline) and `/admin/passkeys.astro` (list passkeys, delete, add new).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/admin/tools.astro`
- Create: `src/pages/admin/passkeys.astro`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Tools page lists all tools with edit form togglable per row
- [ ] Edits submit via fetch PUT to `/api/tools/[id]`
- [ ] Delete calls `DELETE /api/tools/[id]` and removes row from DOM
- [ ] Display order ↑/↓ buttons work
- [ ] Add tool form submits via fetch POST to `/api/tools`
- [ ] Passkeys page lists registered credentials with name and date
- [ ] Delete passkey calls `DELETE /api/passkeys/[id]`
- [ ] "Add another passkey" runs WebAuthn registration ceremony

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → add a second tool, confirm it appears on `/tools`; add a second passkey.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/admin/tools.astro","src/pages/admin/passkeys.astro"],"verifyCommand":"npm run dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Tools CRUD works with fetch PUT/DELETE","Display order reordering works","Add tool form works","Passkeys list with delete","Add another passkey runs WebAuthn ceremony"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Rewrite public blog and tools pages to use SQLite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the static Content Collections-based blog and hardcoded tools page with server-rendered versions that query SQLite. Delete `content.config.ts` and the blog content directory.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/pages/blog/index.astro`
- Modify: `src/pages/blog/[id].astro`
- Modify: `src/pages/tools.astro`
- Delete: `src/content.config.ts`
- Delete: `src/content/blog/.gitkeep` (and directory)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/blog` lists published posts ordered by `created_at DESC`
- [ ] `/blog/[slug]` renders `content_html` for published post; returns 404 for missing/unpublished
- [ ] `/tools` lists active tools ordered by `display_order ASC`
- [ ] Content Collections config deleted; `npm run build` succeeds without it

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no errors; `npm run dev` → `/tools` shows Vigilant card from DB (seeded); create a published post in admin, confirm it appears on `/blog`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/pages/blog/index.astro","src/pages/blog/[id].astro","src/pages/tools.astro","src/content.config.ts","src/content/blog/.gitkeep"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["/blog lists published posts","/blog/[slug] renders content_html","/tools queries SQLite","content.config.ts deleted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Docker build, deploy infrastructure, and nginx port update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the static nginx Docker setup with a multi-stage Node.js Docker build. Update `docker-compose.yml` for the Node container with a SQLite data volume. Update `deploy.sh` to push code and rebuild on VPS. Update `thunderborn.conf` in vigilant-vps to proxy to port 3000. Perform first deploy.

**Files:**
- Create: `Dockerfile` (in Portfolio repo)
- Modify: `docker-compose.yml` (Portfolio repo)
- Modify: `deploy.sh` (Portfolio repo)
- Delete: `nginx.conf` (Portfolio repo — no longer used)
- Modify: `~/Documents/Personal/vigilant-vps/nginx/thunderborn.conf` — change upstream to port 3000

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `docker build .` succeeds
- [ ] `docker run` starts app on port 3000
- [ ] SQLite data volume persists across image rebuilds
- [ ] `thunderborn.conf` upstream changed from `http://portfolio` to `http://portfolio:3000`
- [ ] `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://thunderborn.dev` → `200`

**Verify:** `curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://thunderborn.dev` → `200`

```json:metadata
{"files":["Dockerfile","docker-compose.yml","deploy.sh","nginx.conf","../vigilant-vps/nginx/thunderborn.conf"],"verifyCommand":"curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"%{http_code}\" https://thunderborn.dev","acceptanceCriteria":["docker build succeeds","App runs on port 3000","SQLite volume persists","thunderborn.conf upstream is port 3000","https://thunderborn.dev returns 200"]}
```
